title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-parse
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-parse
no_spec_change_rationale: This migration changes repository governance only and does not alter the existing Swift package API or behavior
